title: BI Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, power bi. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: CoreStack is hiring a junior bi analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V034: BI Analyst at CoreStack. Location: Kyiv. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 1.9 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, power bi, pandas, statistics. Optional skills: product analytics, ga4, data storytelling. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
